meta.title: Contractly — Multilingual forms
meta.description: Build and share forms in English, Spanish, and Hindi. One link, clear responses.

errors.database: Database unreachable. Use a Neon postgresql:// URL in .env, run pnpm db:migrate, and restart the dev server.

dashboard.title: Your forms
dashboard.subtitle: Open a form to manage, edit, or view responses.
dashboard.emptyHint: Start from a template or a blank draft — everything you publish shows up here.

landing.sub: One shareable link. Questions and labels in English, Spanish, and Hindi. No AI in your respondents' way.
landing.heroLine2: From a blank canvas to a live form in minutes — then watch responses land in one place.
landing.trustStrip: Secure sign-in · CSV & JSON export · Your own database
landing.howSub: A calm path from idea to answers — no spreadsheet chaos.

steps.title: Start from a template
steps.body: Choose contact, RSVP, event, or a blank form — then shape it in the visual builder.

steps.title: Write in three languages
steps.body: Switch EN / ES / HI while editing labels so every question reads naturally in each language.

steps.title: Publish one link
steps.body: Go live with a single URL. Respondents pick their language; you stay out of their way.

steps.title: Collect and export
steps.body: Review submissions in your dashboard, download CSV or JSON, duplicate or unpublish anytime.

highlights.title: Field types that fit real life
highlights.body: Text, email, numbers, dates, and multiple choice — with validation on submit.

highlights.title: Ownership by design
highlights.body: Signed-in builders own their forms; public links stay open only for responses.

highlights.title: Polished dark UI
highlights.body: Readable typography, generous spacing, and a builder that feels intentional — not generic.

features.title: Truly multilingual
features.body: App UI and field labels support EN, ES, and HI so your audience picks what fits.

features.title: Free & simple
features.body: Draft, publish, collect. Built for freelancers, schools, and small teams.

features.title: You own the data
features.body: Responses live in your database — export and backups when you need them.

landing.bottomCtaBody: Create a form, publish when it feels right, and share the link wherever your audience is.

footer.tagline: Multilingual forms with a single shareable link — built for humans, not bots.

builder.title: Form builder
builder.subtitle: Add fields, set labels using the language switch above, then publish.
builder.switchLanguageHint: Switch language above to edit Spanish or Hindi text.
builder.empty: No fields yet. Add a question type below.
builder.optionLangHint: Switch language above to edit Spanish or Hindi text.
builder.formDescriptionPlaceholder: Optional — shown under the title on the public form

manage.title: Form overview
manage.shareToCollect: Share your form link to collect responses.
manage.confirmDelete: Delete this form and all responses? This cannot be undone.
manage.confirmUnpublish: Unpublish? The public link will stop working until you publish again.

responses.title: Responses
responses.emptyHint: Share your form link to collect responses.
